user.title: Bark Device
user.description: Set up your Bark device. Copy the device info from the Bark app on your iPhone/iPad first.

data_description.server_url: Defaults to the official server api.day.app; can also be a self-hosted bark-server URL.
data_description.device_key: The last segment of the URL copied from the Bark app home screen.
data_description.encryption: Must match the Bark app's Push Encryption settings exactly (algorithm + key).
data_description.encryption_key: Required only when encryption is enabled; must be exactly 16 ASCII characters.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Bark Device
reconfigure.description: Modify the settings for this Bark device.

data_description.server_url: Defaults to the official server api.day.app; can also be a self-hosted bark-server URL.
data_description.device_key: The last segment of the URL copied from the Bark app home screen.
data_description.encryption: Must match the Bark app's Push Encryption settings exactly (algorithm + key).
data_description.encryption_key: Required only when encryption is enabled; must be exactly 16 ASCII characters.

error.invalid_encryption_key: Encryption key must be exactly 16 ASCII characters
error.test_push_failed: Test push failed; check the server URL, device key and encryption settings

abort.already_configured: This Bark device is already configured

no_target.message: bark.send requires a target Bark device (target_entity / entity_id / device_id).
